title: World Cup Loss Dominates German News, Displacing Even a Mass Shooting
summary_full: A day after a deadly attack in northern Germany, the news media’s attention largely shifted to the country’s poor performance at the World Cup.
summary_public: A day after a deadly attack in northern Germany, the news media’s attention largely shifted to the country’s poor performance at the World Cup.

DE.label: neutral
DE.evidence: World Cup Loss Dominates German News
